Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Respond To Request For Information And Provide Documents To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Mar-12-2024 Continued To Jun-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Respond To Request For Information And Provide Documents To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Nov-15-2023 Continued To Mar-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Steven Ellenberg appearing via zoom for Michael Rabb (petitioner).
Kristen Caverly appearing via zoom for Timothy Kochis and Mary Ann Rabb (co-trustee respondent).

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 28, 2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 06, 2024. The matter is continued to March 12, 2024 and the Parties are to return on March 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

The joint status report is to address status of mediation, any outstanding discovery issues and timelines, what the claims are, the factual issues, the time estimate of the evidentiary hearing, who the witnesses will be and time estimates of witness testimony.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Xiao: Not reported.

Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Respond To Request For Information And Provide Documents To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Continued To Nov-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Steven Ellenberg appearing via zoom for Michael Rabb (petitioner).
Kristen Caverly appearing via zoom for Timothy Kochis and Mary Ann Rabb (co-trustee respondent).

Ms. Caverly stated that the bottle wine goes to the surviving spouse, that they both collected wine together, and that this is of sentimental value to her. The Court encourages both parties to speak with one another and try to resolve this issue without further litigation. First amended petition to instruct co-trustees to respond to request etc., is continued to November 15, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bernardo. Not reported.

Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Respond To Request For Information And Provide Documents To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Respond To Request For Information And Provide Documents To Beneficiaries
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Continued To Aug-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Steven Ellenberg appearing via zoom for Michael Rabb (petitioner).
Kristen Caverly appearing via zoom for Timothy Kochis and Mary Ann Rabb (co-trustee respondent).

Mr. Ellenberg stated that they had the opportunity to exchange emails, that they have not spoken, that he had not planned on filing a response to the objections and that maybe once they have the accounting things may be resolved. Mrs. Caverly stated that she is planning on providing an accounting, that they are finishing up with the sub-trust funding and that she has provided information to Mr. Ellenberg. The Court stated that the requested relief in the petition doesn't make sense, that the proposed order has specific relief, that the petition is far to general and that if Mr. Ellenberg wants this petition to go forward, he will have to amend. Mr. Ellenberg stated he can amend the prayer to conform with the proposed order. Mrs. Caverly stated that she will provide the accounting to Mr. Ellenberg, but she does not intend on filing it. The Petition to instruct co-trustees to respond to request information etc., is continued to August 09, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court encouraged Mrs. Caverly to get the accounting out by middle of July.

Judge; Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.
